description: This is a Kotlin source file defining the MainActivity class for an Android application. It sets up the main activity, retrieves a message, processes it using utility functions, and displays the result in a TextView.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: Main activity class for the Android application, responsible for initializing the UI and displaying a processed message.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Called when the activity is starting. Sets the layout and initializes the TextView with a processed message.

methods.name: buildMessage
methods.description: Builds and returns a string message by splitting, joining, and capitalizing a message.
